# Muktabodha — Indological Research Institute Digital Library (registry only)

**Homepage:** https://muktabodha.org/
**Catalog:** https://muktalib7.com/DL_CATALOG_ROOT/digital_library.htm
**Secure-access entry:** https://muktalib7.com/DL_CATALOG_ROOT/digital_library_secure_entry.htm
**License:** "© 2025 Muktabodha Indological Research Institute. All
Rights Reserved." — proprietary; access is "freely available to scholars
and seekers worldwide" but redistribution is not authorised in the
public terms. Registration is required for the secure-access etext +
manuscript collections.

## Status

`fetch_method: "manual_registration_required"`. No automated fetch in
this run. The library covers ~3 000 digitised manuscripts and 500+
searchable e-texts, heavily weighted to Kashmir Śaivism (the 75-volume
KSTS digitisation is the foundational asset) and the broader
Śaiva/Śākta/Tantric corpus.

## Workflow for future fetch

1. Register at https://muktabodha.org/ (request academic access).
2. Confirm catalog UID for each work via
   https://muktalib7.com/DL_CATALOG_ROOT/digital_library.htm.
3. Download per-text under the granted institutional licence.
4. Track per-text licence terms in `data/external_ingest_manifest.json`.

The manifest registers Muktabodha as a coarse source with
`fetch_status: "blocked"` and `fetch_blocker:
"registration_required"`. No individual text entries — they will be
populated after registration.
